name: Banana Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay bread cubes on a clean work surface for one hour, allowing the bread to dry out slightly.
2. Place the bread cubes in a greased casserole dish.
3. Melt margarine and drizzle over the bread cubes, tossing to coat evenly.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt until well combined.
5. Stir in the sliced bananas.
6. Mix the banana mixture with the bread cubes.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 45-50 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Prepare the sauce by melting margarine in a saucepan.
9. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a small bowl.
10. Add the butter mixture to the saucepan with the milk and maple syrup, stirring constantly over medium heat.
11. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches a full boil and boils for one minute.
12. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla.
13. Serve warm sauce over the pudding.
Yield: 6-8 servings
